dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a breakout above resistance (prev_high) with closing price confirmation (close > prev_high). Entry uses the closing price confirmation rule. Exit condition inferred as reversal below SMA_20 since AUTHOR_SILENT. Average rise of 5.49% and average decline of 5.53% used to estimate stop_loss_pct. Pattern is 'Up Breakout' in ANY regime.

Exit condition inferred as reversal below SMA_20 since AUTHOR_SILENT. Average rise of 5.49% and average decline of 5.53% used to estimate stop_loss_pct. Pattern is 'Up Breakout' in ANY regime.

source_rule_text: Up breakout with closing price confirmation
